The Government's Decisions:
Food, shelter, etc. for Kirtankaras and Warkaras in the state of Maharashtra during the Wari period.
Providing medical assistance, protection, etc., as well as other welfare schemes.
The Chief Minister's Warkari Corporation has been set up for implementation. Accordingly
Administrative composition of Mukhyamantri Warkari Corporation, composition of the Board of Directors, shareholders of the company
